artifact: Computes Chinese Simplified foreign-data rows as a percentage of all joined card foreign-data rows.
sql:
SELECT 100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE fd.language = 'Chinese Simplified') / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS percentage_chinese_simplified
FROM cards AS c
JOIN foreign_data AS fd
  ON fd.uuid = c.uuid;

raw_response.sql:
SELECT 100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE fd.language = 'Chinese Simplified') / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS percentage_chinese_simplified
FROM cards AS c
JOIN foreign_data AS fd
  ON fd.uuid = c.uuid;
raw_response.artifact: Computes Chinese Simplified foreign-data rows as a percentage of all joined card foreign-data rows.
